headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -68.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending down 32% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 143 quotes and a striking 107 at strong intensity, meaning a large volume of people are venting hard today.
• The frustration score of 53.2 sits in the upper half of its 159-day range (-1.6 to 166.8), signalling an elevated but not extreme level of activity.
• Optimism slipped further to -40.1, its lowest point recently, while Fears edged slightly less negative than yesterday — both remain well below neutral.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
